problem id: 7c4db527
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00010110 -> 01110100
  11001101 -> 01011001
  10000101 -> 01111101
  11101001 -> 01001011
  11001110 -> 00011001
  10000111 -> 11111101
  11110000 -> 10000111
  11110100 -> 10000101
  01110100 -> 11000101

query: 00111100
predicted answer: 11100001
